ValidationRule.description: OBJECTIF : Closed : Governance Date != null IF Outcome = Rejected
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( RecordType.Name = "IS Agreement" , NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), ISPICKVAL(Governance_Decision__c, "Rejected"), ISBLANK(Governance_Decision_Date__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If Governance Decision is "Rejected" then Governance Decision Date cannot be blank.
